nasb.text: They brought one. And He *said to them, “Whose likeness and inscription is this?” And they said to Him, “Caesar’s.”

esv.text: And they brought one. And he said to them, “Whose likeness and inscription is this?” They said to him, “Caesar’s.”

cnv.text: 他們就拿來了。耶穌問他們：“這是誰的像，誰的名號？”他們回答他：“凱撒的。”

ccb.text: 他们就拿来一个银币，耶稣问他们：“上面刻的是谁的像和名号？” 他们说：“凯撒的。”

csbs.text: 他们就拿来了。耶稣问他们：“这是谁的像和名号？” 他们回答说：“是凯撒的。”
